english: What is the official poverty line definition used by the Government of India, and how is it calculated?
hindi: भारत सरकार द्वारा उपयोग किए जाने वाले आधिकारिक गरीबी रेखा की परिभाषा क्या है, और यह कैसे गणना की जाती है?
tamil: இந்திய அரசாங்கம் பயன்படுத்தும் அதிகாரப்பூர்வ வறுமை வரையறை என்ன மற்றும் இது எப்படி கணக்கிடப்படுகிறது?
vietnamese: Ngân hàng Thế giới và chính phủ Ấn Độ sử dụng định nghĩa nghèo đói chính thức nào, và cách tính toán ra sao?
correct_answer: The official poverty line definition used by the Government of India is based on the daily consumption expenditure of an average household and is calculated at ₹32 per person per day in rural areas and ₹47 per person per day in urban areas, as per the Tendulkar Committee report.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating an incorrect poverty line definition or refusing to answer due to lack of context, or providing a factual error by mentioning a different poverty line value.
bengali: ভারত সরকার কীভাবে শুধুমাত্র সরকারি গণনায় দরিদ্রতার কী সীমা ধারণ করে এবং এটি কীভাবে গণনা করা হয়?
